name: Sub-agent tier-selection inheritance via SUBAGENT_TYPE
symptom: Every sub-agent's first Edit/Write/Bash was denied by the tier-selection gate even when the parent session had already invoked tier-selection. Builder/Researcher/Architect dispatches required redundant per-context tier-selection invocations.
repro_command:
rm -rf /tmp/pf-r-test && mkdir -p /tmp/pf-r-test/.framework-state && cat > /tmp/pf-r-test/.framework-state/session.json <<EOF
{"session_started_at":"2026-05-09T10:00:00Z","tier_selection_invoked_at":"2026-05-09T10:01:00Z","triage_invoked_at":"","last_user_prompt_at":"2026-05-09T10:00:30Z"}
EOF
export CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR=/tmp/pf-r-test && echo '{"tool_name":"Edit","tool_input":{"file_path":"/tmp/x.txt","subagent_type":"production-framework:builder"}}' | bash hooks/pre-tool-use
